title: GitHub Actions
subTitle: CI/CD with OIDC, quality gates, and safe deploys
overviewContent: I build automated build/test/deploy pipelines with GitHub Actions across independently deployed services. I authenticate to AWS via OIDC (no long-lived keys), factor common logic into reusable workflows, enforce CI quality gates (build, tests, linting) before merge, and add circuit-breaker style safeguards so a bad deploy halts rather than rolling out.
